title: (BUG) wallet/db.rs: all_sessions() has no LIMIT — unbounded result set from payment_sessions table
description: WalletStore::all_sessions() runs 'SELECT ... FROM payment_sessions' with no WHERE or LIMIT clause. A wallet that has processed many sessions over its lifetime (or if an attacker created many sessions) will load the entire table into memory on every call. In a long-running deployment this becomes an OOM risk. The function is called from payment.rs and potentially from CLI history commands. Fix: add a reasonable LIMIT (e.g. 1000 most recent sessions) or change callers to use a scoped query.
